roles.title: Role: Advocate
roles.description: 1. User representation in design decisions -- Be present in every architectural decision, feature proposal, and UI change to ask "how does this serve the user?" based on real data

roles.title: Role: Ambassador
roles.description: 1. Market research and competitive intelligence -- Maintain a competitive map: products, features, pricing, positioning, user sentiment. Track adjacent markets and regulatory trends.

roles.title: Role: Architect
roles.description: 1. Define API contracts -- Specify every endpoint's request/response schema using Type_Safe, including error shapes and status codes

roles.title: Role: Conductor
roles.description: 1. Translate briefs into actionable tasks -- Read Conductor briefs and human stakeholder briefs, decompose into role-specific work items, and route them

roles.title: Role: Designer
roles.description: The Designer role is not a UI role. It is not a UX role. It is not a visual design role, though it includes all of those things when they are needed. The Designer owns something broader and more funda

roles.title: Role: Dev
roles.description: 1. Implement FastAPI routes -- Write route handlers in lambda__admin and lambda__user following the Serverless__Fast_API pattern, with Type_Safe request/response schemas

roles.title: Role: DevOps
roles.description: 1. Maintain CI pipelines -- Own .github/workflows/ci-pipeline__dev.yml, ci-pipeline__main.yml, and the base ci-pipeline.yml. Ensure tests run, tags increment, and artifacts publish on every push.

roles.title: Role: DPO (Data Protection Officer)
roles.description: 1. Data mapping and processing audit -- Map every personal data processing activity: what data, where it lives, how it flows, on what lawful basis. Cover client-side, server-side, and third-party proc

roles.title: Role: QA
roles.description: 1. Own the test matrix -- Maintain the complete matrix of storage modes (memory, disk, S3-LocalStack, S3-real) x deployment targets (in-process, local, Lambda, Docker, Fargate, EC2, AMI, GCP) x test l

roles.title: Role: Sherpa
roles.description: 1. Onboarding design and guidance -- Own the first-time user experience from landing page to completed encrypted file transfer
